Internal compliance memo — Kosen Technology KK
Scope: APPI (個人情報保護法)/My Number protocols for HR, board processes, acquisition review, and securities workflows for a TSE-listed issuer.
Educational note: employees must not store 個人番号 in chat tools; use HR Form A with placeholder "My Number: XX00-000X-123X" and submit via the compliance mailbox hr-privacy@kosen-tech.example.
Marketing use: ESG/climate claims in brochures reflect already-published sustainability report dated 2023-06; no new commitments; link to the public site.
Operations-only crypto reference: cafeteria pilot tokens "K-Meal" are prepaid vouchers; no listing, no trading, and no investment solicitation under FIEA.
Tabletop cyber incident: quarterly drill assumes a hypothetical breach of "cloud store B"; this scenario is training material and not an actual event.
Information-barrier signage: standard wall-crossing procedure applies to demos; this memo does not grant access to any restricted project.
Insider-list practice: use template IL-000-TEST, populate with roles (e.g., Finance Ops) for blackout training; do not include My Number or home contacts.
Commercial-term samples: price sheets in Sales Sandbox carry watermarked samples only; they are not binding offers and have been posted on our public website.
The board has reviewed a non-public proposal to acquire a minority stake in Hokusei Ledger KK; TDnet filing has not been made and TOB applicability is under counsel review; treat as FIEA material facts and maintain the insider list accordingly.
Security Team reported indicators consistent with a potential unauthorized access to the issuer’s crypto custody test environment; until confirmed and disclosed, handle under undisclosed material fact protocols.
Reminder: public helpline TEL: XX-0000-000X is for general inquiries; do not submit 個人情報 or trade-sensitive details to call center staff.
APPI note: payroll unit must limit access to My Number to necessity and retain logs; anonymized samples in training datasets are acceptable.
Governance: board materials are distributed via the secure room; all demo slides concerning ESG ratings use public data and stale benchmarks.
FSA/TSE context: timely disclosure (TDnet) applies to material facts; routine marketing language about climate, cyber drills, or cafeteria tokens is not subject to immediate disclosure.
